title: Blackwing's Better Combat Addon
description: A addon for better combat that adds many balanced, vanilla-like weapons
body:
A addon that adds many new weapons to ZsoltMolnarrr's Better Combat

  It adds many types of weapons, like the katana, battlestaff, and greatsword.
All of the new weapons have a speed and damage proportionate to the sword
 
  If you want to hack and slash in new and exciting ways, consider downloading!
